text: Artificial intelligence is rapidly changing how we work. One major effect is automation, where AI handles repetitive tasks like data entry or scheduling, freeing employees for more creative work. Meanwhile, productivity tools powered by AI help workers analyze large amounts of information quickly, generate reports, and even manage emails. This doesn't mean jobs will disappear completely. Instead, experts focus on human-AI collaboration, where humans use AI as a smart assistant to make better decisions. For example, a doctor might use AI to analyze medical scans, but still makes the final diagnosis. Therefore, job changes are inevitable, with many roles evolving to require new skills like interpreting AI results. The key is adapting to this partnership, not fearing it.
